UnitAbilities.Title: Unearthly Power
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of the battle round, select one of the abilities in the Crimson King section (see left). Until the start of the next battle round, this model has that ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Lord of the Planet of the Sorcerers (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: This model can attempt up to two Rituals per turn instead of one, and each time this model attempts a Ritual, add 2 to the Psychic test result.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: SUPREME COMMANDER
Infos.Text: If this model is in your army, it must be your Warlord.

Sections.Title: Impossible Form (Psychic)
Sections.Text: Each time an attack is made against this Psyker (excluding Psychic Attacks), subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Sections.Title: Treason of Tzeentch (Psychic)
Sections.Text: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to this Psyker. Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

Sections.Title: Time Flux (Aura, Psychic)
Sections.Text: While a friendly Thousand Sons unit is within 6" of this Psyker, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Scryer of Fates (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: If your army includes this model, after both players have deployed their armies, you can select up to three Thousand Sons units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Arch-Sorcerer of Tzeentch (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model attempts a Ritual, add 1 to the Psychic test result.

UnitAbilities.Title: Malefic Maelstrom (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Glimpse of Eternity (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, you can change the result of one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for this model to an unmodified 6.

Weapons.Name: Fires of the Abyss – focused witchfire

UnitAbilities.Title: Empyric Guidance (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Twisted Sorceries (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, in your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength and Attacks characteristics of Psychic weapons equipped by this model by 3.

UnitAbilities.Title: Arcane Shield (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rebind Rubricae (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Command phase, if this model is leading a unit, you can roll one D6: on a 1, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit; on a 6, you can return up to 2 destroyed Bodyguard models to that unit.

Units.Name: EXALTED SORCERER ON DISC OF TZEENTCH

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Exalted Sorcerer on Disc of Tzeentch

UnitAbilities.Title: Illusions of Tzeentch (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

UnitAbilities.Title: Binding Tendrils (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy Infantry unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with Arcane Fire. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is ensnared. While a unit is ensnared, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

UnitAbilities.Title: Servile Pawns
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly Thousand Sons Infantry units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Spirit Snare
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a friendly Thousand Sons Psyker model with the Cabal of Sorcerers ability is destroyed while within 9" of one or more models with this ability, select one of those models: until the end of the battle, each time the selected model attempts a Ritual, add 1 to the Psychic test result (to a maximum of +2).

UnitAbilities.Title: Glamour of Tzeentch (Aura, Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Thousand Sons Infantry unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

Units.Name: DAEMON PRINCE OF TZEENTCH WITH WINGS

ModelCompositions.ModelName: Daemon Prince of Tzeentch with Wings

UnitAbilities.Title: Hunter of Souls
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack, if the target is a Character unit, you can re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and a Wound roll of 1. (If that attack targets a Psyker Character unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and the Wound roll instead). Each time this model destroys a Character unit, it regains D3 lost wounds. (If that Character unit was a Psyker unit this model regains up to 3 lost wounds instead)

UnitAbilities.Title: Aetherstride (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text:
In your Movement phase, when this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, it can perform an aetherstride. If it does:
▪ It can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.
▪ Until the end of the turn, its Dark Blessing has the [SUSTAINED HITS D3] ability.
▪ Until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

UnitAbilities.Title: Empyric Guidance (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Marked by Fate (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit that is visible to this Psyker model. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Prophetic Sentinels
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, when you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch/Heroic Intervention stratagem, that use is -1 CP.

Units.Name: SCARAB OCCULT TERMINATORS
Units.Faction: Cabal of Sorcerers (Scarab Occult Sorcerer only)

UnitAbilities.Title: Rites of Coalescence
UnitAbilities.Text: While this unit contains one or more Psyker models, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bringers of Change
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If that attack targets a unit within range of an objective marker you do not control, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Icon of Flame
UnitAbilities.Text: Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit (excluding Characters) have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ensorcelled Destruction
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) that was hit by one or more Psychic Attacks made by a Thousand Sons Psyker model from your army this phase (including the Doombolt Ritual), improve the Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of that attack by 1.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Ensorcelled Annihilation
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit that was hit by one or more Psychic Attacks made by a Thousand Sons Psyker model from your army this phase (including the Doombolt Ritual), you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sorcerous Support
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly Thousand Sons Infantry model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes a Psychic Attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll and 1 to the Wound roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Thousand Sons Infantry models (excluding Terminator models).

UnitAbilities.Title: Siege Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: When making ranged attacks with its demolisher cannon, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, when making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Assault Ramp
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a unit disembarks from this Transport after it has made a Normal move, that unit is eligible to declare a charge this turn.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 14 Thousand Sons Infantry models. Each Terminator model takes up 2 spaces.

UnitAbilities.Title: Terrifying Assault
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, after this model has shot or fought, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle‑shock test, subtracting 1 from that test if it is within 9" of one or more Thousand Sons Psyker units from your army.

UnitAbilities.Title: Devoted to Destruction
UnitAbilities.Text: If this model is equipped with two melee weapons in addition to its close combat weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those two weapons.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blazing Salvos
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, that unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, subtract 1 from the Hit roll of all ranged attacks it makes.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Snarling Protector
UnitAbilities.Text:
▪ You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention stratagem, regardless of any other uses of that stratagem this phase. If you do:
□ That use is -1 CP.
□ That use does not prevent any uses of that stratagem on other units this phase.
▪ When this unit declares a charge, if a friendly engaged Psyker unit is within 12" of this unit, you can use this part of this ability. If you do:
□ This unit can re-roll that charge roll.
□ This unit must end that charge move engaged with an enemy unit engaged with that friendly Psyker unit.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Flame-wreathed
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model ends its Move phase, select one enemy unit it moved over during this turn; until the end of the turn, models in that unit cannot benefit from the Benefit of Cover.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Regenerating Monstrosities
UnitAbilities.Text: At the start of each player’s Command phase, one model in this unit regains 3 lost wounds.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bestial Prophet
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sacrificial Blessing
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, in your Shooting phase and the Fight phase, each time that unit is selected to shoot or fight, this model can use this ability. If it does, select one Bodyguard model in that unit; that Bodyguard model is destroyed and, until the end of the phase, add D3 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of Psychic weapons equipped by this model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Prophesied Doom
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Malign Trickery
UnitAbilities.Text: In your opponent's Movement phase, if an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, this unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".

UnitAbilities.Title: Ambushing Hunters
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it in Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Brayhorn
UnitAbilities.Text: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for units in the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Herd Banner
UnitAbilities.Text: While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control, improve the Leadership characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Mutating Vortex (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Movement phase roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of this model: on a 2-3 that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5 that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6 that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds. Each enemy unit within range of this ability must then take a Battle-shock test.

UnitAbilities.Title: Immaterial Flare (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Thousand Sons Psyker model is within 6" of this model, each time that model Channels the Warp, add 1 to the Psychic test result. This is not cumulative with any other modifiers to the Psychic test result.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-4 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time it makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: One Head Looks Forward
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for this model; if that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: One Head Looks Back (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemon Lord of Tzeentch (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Scintillating Legions unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Master of Magicks (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, select one of the following abilities: [IGNORES COVER], [LETHAL HITS], [SUSTAINED HITS D3]. Until the end of the phase, this model's Bolt of Change has that ability.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-7 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-7 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Bounding Leaps
UnitAbilities.Text: This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Slashing Dive
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Movement phase, after this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Daemonic Icon
UnitAbilities.Text: Models in the bearer’s unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.

UnitAbilities.Title: Instrument of Chaos
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Split
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a Pink Horror or Blue Horror model in this unit is destroyed, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, if this unit is not destroyed, roll one D6 for that model. On a 4+, if it was a Pink Horror, add two Blue Horror models to this unit, and if it was a Blue Horror, add one Brimstone Horror model to this unit.

Infos.Title: HORRORS ARE PINK. HORRORS ARE BLUE. WHERE ONCE THERE WAS ONE, NOW THERE ARE TWO.
Infos.Text:
If, at any point, this unit contains no Pink Horror models, use the Blue Horrors datasheet for this unit.

Designer's Note: While this unit contains one or more Pink Horror models, the Sullen Malevolence and Exploding Horrors abilities from the Blue Horrors datasheet do not apply to this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Split
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a Blue Horror model in this unit is destroyed, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, if this unit is not destroyed, roll one D6 for that model. On a 4+, add one Brimstone Horror model to this unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sullen Malevolence (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, if this unit contains one or more Blue Horror models, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that enemy unit by 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Exploding Horrors
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then select one or more Brimstone Horror models in this unit. For each Brimstone Horror model you select, roll one D6: on a 4+, that model is destroyed and that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

UnitAbilities.Title: Scuttling Walker
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding Titanic models) and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

UnitAbilities.Title: Destroyer of Futures
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem. For each of those attacks that targets an enemy unit within 9" of one or more Thousand Sons Psyker units from your army, a hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 4+ instead.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-6 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Rule.Title: SORCEROUS INVIGORATION
Rule.Text: (Once per turn, per unit) When a friendly Thousand Sons Psyker unit (excluding Monster units) successfully manifests a Ritual, that unit heals D3 wounds.

Stratagems.Name: Relentless Rebirth
Stratagems.When: Any phase, when a friendly Infantry/Mounted Thousand Sons Psyker unit suffers a mortal wound.
Stratagems.Target: That Infantry/Mounted Thousand Sons Psyker unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit has Feel No Pain 5+ against mortal wounds.

Stratagems.Name: Mutagenic Magicks
Stratagems.When: Start of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly engaged Thousand Sons Psyker unit.
Stratagems.Effect:
Select one enemy unit engaged with your unit. Roll six D6:
▪ For each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

Stratagems.Name: Multitudinous Limbs
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Infantry/Mounted Thousand Sons Psyker unit is selected to make an advance/fall-back move.
Stratagems.Target: That Infantry/Mounted Thousand Sons Psyker unit.
Stratagems.Effect: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to start an action.

Enhancements.Name: Eruption of Vitality
Enhancements.Description:
Infantry/Mounted Thousand Sons Psyker model only. The first time this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6:
▪ On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed, unengaged, with 3 wounds remaining.

Enhancements.Name: Curse of Life
Enhancements.Description: Infantry/Mounted Thousand Sons Psyker model only. When this model heals as a result of the Sorcerous Invigoration detachment rule, you can add 3 to the number of wounds healed.

Rule.Title: ENSORCELLED ANIMUS
Rule.Text:
▪ Friendly Sekhetar Robots units’ attacks have [PSYCHIC].
▪ Friendly Thousand Sons Psyker units have the following ability:
Infusion (Aura): While a friendly Sekhetar Robots unit is within 12" of this unit, that unit’s melee attacks have +1 WS.

Stratagems.Name: Arcane Venting
Stratagems.When: End of your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly Sekhetar Robots unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one objective your unit is controlling. That objective is secured.

Stratagems.Name: Ectoplasmic Extrusion
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Sekhetar Robots unit within 12" of a friendly Thousand Sons Psyker unit starts an action.
Stratagems.Target: That Sekhetar Robots unit.
Stratagems.Effect: That action does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.

Stratagems.Name: Warp Fields
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly Sekhetar Robots unit within 12" of a friendly Thousand Sons Psyker unit.
Stratagems.Target: That Sekhetar Robots unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Ranged attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have -1 to wound rolls.

Enhancements.Name: Walking Rampart
Enhancements.Description:
Sorcerer/Exalted Sorcerer model only. This model has the following abilities:
▪ Soul Bound: In your Movement phase, at the start or end of this unit’s move, you can select one friendly Sekhetar Robots unit within 3" of this model. That Sekhetar Robots unit heals D3+1 wounds.
▪ Kine-shielded Guardians: While this model is within 3" of a friendly Sekhetar Robots unit, this model has Lone Operative.

Enhancements.Name: Occulus Infernum
Enhancements.Description: Sorcerer/Exalted Sorcerer model only. In your Movement phase, at the start or end of this unit’s move, you can select one friendly Sekhetar Robots unit within 6" of this unit. That unit’s ranged attacks have +1 BS until the start of your next turn.

AddedAbilities.Title: Infusion (Aura)
AddedAbilities.Text: While a friendly Sekhetar Robots unit is within 12" of this unit, that unit’s melee attacks have +1 WS.

Rule.Restrictions: This detachment has the Mutant tag and cannot be taken with another Mutant detachment.
Rule.Title: ALL-SEEING MUTANT HORDES
Rule.Text:
▪ Friendly Tzaangors units have Battleline.
▪ In your Shooting phase, while a friendly Mutant unit is shooting, enemy units have +6" detection range.

Stratagems.Name: Prismatic Displacement
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Infantry/Mounted Mutant unit is selected to make an advance/fall-back move.
Stratagems.Target: That Infantry/Mounted Mutant unit.
Stratagems.Effect:
▪ Your unit’s ranged attacks have [ASSAULT] until the end of the turn.
▪ That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot/declare a charge.

Stratagems.Name: Temporal Instability
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Infantry/Mounted Mutant unit is selected to make an advance/fall-back move.
Stratagems.Target: That Infantry/Mounted Mutant unit.
Stratagems.Effect: In a turn your unit made an advance/fall-back move, that move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to start an action.

Stratagems.Name: The Land Writhes
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Monster Mutant unit is selected to move.
Stratagems.Target: That Monster Mutant unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit has Mobile.

Enhancements.Name: Unravelled Fates
Enhancements.Description: Tzaangor Shaman model only. In your Movement phase, at the start or end of this unit's move, you can select one friendly battle-shocked Mutant unit within 6" of this model. That unit is no longer battle-shocked.

Enhancements.Name: Thicket of Bladed Bone
Enhancements.Description:
Spawn unit only. This unit’s melee attacks have:
▪ +1 AP.
▪ [CLEAVE 1].

Rule.Title: KINDRED SORCERY
Rule.Text:
In your Command phase, you can select one of the abilities listed below to take effect until the start of your next Command phase. You can only select each of these abilities once per battle.

Imbued Manifestation
Add 6" to the Range characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by Thousand Sons models from your army.

Psychic Maelstrom
Each time a Thousand Sons model from your army makes an attack with a Psychic weapon, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Wrath of the Immaterium
Psychic weapons equipped by Thousand Sons models from your army have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Psychic Dominion
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, Psychic weapons equipped by models in the attacking unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability, and models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against Psychic Attacks.

Stratagems.Name: Destined by Fate
Stratagems.When: Any phase, just after a saving throw is failed for a Thousand Sons Psyker model from your army. If you are using fast dice rolling, this Stratagem can still be used after rolling multiple saving throws at once.
Stratagems.Target: That Psyker model.
Stratagems.Effect: Change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0. If you are using fast dice rolling, select one of those attacks you failed a saving throw for.

Stratagems.Name: Egotistical Power
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons Psyker unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Select the Imbued Manifestation, Psychic Maelstrom or Wrath of the Immaterium ability (see opposite). Until the start of your next Command phase, that ability applies to your unit instead of any other Kindred Sorcery ability, even if you have already selected that ability this battle.

Stratagems.Name: Desecration of Worlds
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons Psyker unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
Stratagems.Effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

Stratagems.Name: Arcane Focus
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase, just after you take a Psychic test for a Thousand Sons model from your army that Channelled the Warp (before resolving that Ritual).
Stratagems.Target: That Thousand Sons model.
Stratagems.Effect: Re-roll all of the D6 rolled for that Psychic test (including the additional D6 for Channeling the Warp).

Stratagems.Name: Devastating Sorcery
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons Psyker unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, add 9" to the Range characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in your unit, and each time a model in your unit makes an attack with a Psychic weapon, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

Enhancements.Name: Lord of Forbidden Lore
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons model only. Each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving that Ritual, add 6" to its range.

Enhancements.Name: Incandaeum
Enhancements.Description: Exalted Sorcerer model only. Once per battle, when selecting a Ritual for the bearer to attempt, you can select Doombolt, even if a model from your army have already attempted to manifest that Ritual this phase.

Enhancements.Name: Umbralefic Crystal
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons model only. Once per battle, in your Command phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set that unit back up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units.

Enhancements.Name: Eldritch Vortex of E’taph
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons model only. Add 1 to the Strength and Damage characteristics of Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

Rule.Restrictions:
You can include Scintillating Legions units in your army, even though they do not have the Thousand Sons Faction keyword. The combined points cost of such units you can include in your army is:
	▪ Incursion - Up to 500 pts
	▪ Strike Force - Up to 1000 pts
	▪ Onslaught - Up to 1500 pts

No Scintillating Legions models from your army can be your Warlord.
Rule.Title: INFERNAL PACTS
Rule.Text:
Scintillating Legions units from your army have the following ability:
	▪ Daemonic Illusions (Aura): While a friendly Thousand Sons Psyker unit is within 6" of and visible to this unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

Thousand Sons units from your army have the following ability:
	▪ Mortal Sorcery (Aura): While a friendly Scintillating Legions Psyker unit is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that Scintillating Legions unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

Stratagems.Name: Sulphurous Veil
Stratagems.Category: CHANGEHOST OF DECEIT - BATTLE TACTIC STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons or Scintillating Legions unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Stratagems.Name: Deceptive Glamour
Stratagems.Category: CHANGEHOST OF DECEIT - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Start of the Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy model within Engagement Range of your unit selects targets for its attacks, it can only target your unit if there are no eligible Scintillating Legions targets for those attacks.

Stratagems.Name: Ethereal Phantasm
Stratagems.Category: CHANGEHOST OF DECEIT - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
Stratagems.Target: One Scintillating Legions unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6", or a Normal move of up to 6" instead if it is wholly within 6" of one or more friendly Thousand Sons units.

Stratagems.Name: Fractal Disjunction
Stratagems.Category: CHANGEHOST OF DECEIT - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Scintillating Legions unit from your army (excluding Monsters) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

Stratagems.Name: Chronosorcerous Bleed
Stratagems.Category: CHANGEHOST OF DECEIT - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: Start of your opponent's Charge phase.
Stratagems.Target: One friendly unengaged Thousand Sons Psyker/Scintillating Legions unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. When that enemy unit declares a charge, that enemy unit has -1 to charge rolls.

Stratagems.Name: Glimmershift Portal
Stratagems.Category: CHANGEHOST OF DECEIT - STRATEGIC PLOY STRATAGEM
Stratagems.When: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
Stratagems.Target: Up to two Scintillating Legions units from your army (excluding Monsters), or one Scintillating Legions Monster unit from your army, if all of those units are more than 3" horizontally away from all enemy units.
Stratagems.Effect: Remove those units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Nethershriek Mind-Eater
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons or Lord of Change model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to the bearer. That unit must take a Battle-shock test; if that test is failed, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds.

Enhancements.Name: Diabolic Savant
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons Infantry model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly Scintillating Legions units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp (pg 67), add 1 to the Psychic test result.

Enhancements.Name: Duplicitous Malediction
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons or Lord of Change model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three Thousand Sons units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, you can set those units up in Strategic Reserves if you wish, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

Enhancements.Name: Tome of True Names
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons Infantry model only. Once per battle, at the start of any phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer has a 2+ invulnerable save.

AddedAbilities.Title: Daemonic Illusions (Aura)
AddedAbilities.Text: While a friendly Thousand Sons Psyker unit is within 6" of and visible to this unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks.

AddedAbilities.Title: Mortal Sorcery (Aura)
AddedAbilities.Text: While a friendly Scintillating Legions Psyker unit is within 6" of and visible to this unit, that Scintillating Legions unit has the Cabal of Sorcerers ability.

Rule.Title: WARPMELD SACRIFICE
Rule.Text:
Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot or fight and one or more Tzeentch Mutant Infantry or Tzeentch Mutant Mounted units from your army are selected as a target of one or more of those attacks, each of those Tzeentch Mutant units can make a Warpmeld Sacrifice. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll. At the end of the phase, that Tzeentch Mutant unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Each time a Tzeentch Mutant Infantry or Tzeentch Mutant Mounted unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, before selecting its targets, that unit can make a Warpmeld Sacrifice. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll. At the end of the phase, that Tzeentch Mutant unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Stratagems.Name: Gift of Change
Stratagems.When: Any phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons Character model from your army (excluding Monsters) that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: At the end of the phase, add one Tzeentch Chaos spawn unit containing one model to your army, and set it up as close as possible to where your model was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
Stratagems.Restrictions: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

Stratagems.Name: Warped Vicissitude
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Tzaangors unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

Stratagems.Name: Deranged Ferocity
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after a Tzeentch Mutant unit from your army is selected to fight.
Stratagems.Target: That Tzeentch Mutant unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Pile-in or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3", and to fight, any models in it that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

Stratagems.Name: Blessed Transmutations
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons Psyker model from your army, and one friendly Tzaangors unit that is below its Starting Strength and within 12" of that Psyker model.
Stratagems.Effect: Return up to D3+1 destroyed models (excluding Characters) to your Tzaangors unit.

Stratagems.Name: Touched by Tzeentch
Stratagems.When: Start of your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tzeentch Mutant unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

Stratagems.Name: Twisted Mirage
Stratagems.When: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Tzeentch Mutant unit from your army that is arriving from Strategic Reserves this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, or anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy units if it is a Monster unit. In either case, until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge.

Enhancements.Name: Warpmeld Dagger
Enhancements.Description: Tzaangor Shaman model only. Each time the bearer attempts a Ritual, just before determining the Psychic test result, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer suffers D3 mortal wounds; if it is not destroyed as a result, add 1 to that Psychic test result for each of those mortal wounds suffered.

Enhancements.Name: Diamond of Distortion
Enhancements.Description: Tzaangor Shaman model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: Bray Lord
Enhancements.Description: Sorcerer or Infernal Master model only. The bearer has the Scouts 6" ability. During the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a Tzaangors unit.

Enhancements.Name: Flowing Flesh
Enhancements.Description: Tzaangor Shaman model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability and a Wounds characteristic of 5.

Rule.Title: ALL IS DUST
Rule.Text: Each time an attack with an unmodified Damage characteristic of 1 is allocated to a Rubricae model from your army, add 1 to any armour saving throw made against that attack.

Stratagems.Name: Ardent Automata
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after a Rubricae unit from your army Falls Back.
Stratagems.Target: That Rubricae unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Inexorable Advance
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Rubricae unit from your army.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit can ignore any or all modifiers to its Move characteristic and to Advance rolls made for it, and ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

Stratagems.Name: Infernal Fusillade
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons Psyker unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, all inferno bolt pistols, inferno boltguns, inferno combi-bolters and inferno combi-weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [PSYCHIC] ability and a Strength characteristic of 5.

Stratagems.Name: Revenge of the Rubricae
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after a Thousand Sons Psyker model from your army is destroyed.
Stratagems.Target: One Rubricae unit from your army that was within 6" of that Psyker model when it was destroyed.
Stratagems.Effect: After the attacking unit has shot, your Rubricae unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target the enemy unit that just destroyed your Psyker model (and only if it is an eligible target).

Stratagems.Name: Implacable Guardians
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Rubric Marines Psyker unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit (excluding Psyker models), subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Stratagems.Name: Unwavering Phalanx
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
Stratagems.Target: One Rubric Marines unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

Enhancements.Name: Risen Rubricae
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons model only. At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, select either two Rubricae Battleline units from your army or one other Rubricae unit from your army; models in the selected units have the Infiltrators ability.

Enhancements.Name: Arcane Thralls
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons model only. While a friendly Rubricae unit is within 9" of the bearer, you can re-roll Battle-shock tests taken for that unit.

Enhancements.Name: Lord of the Rubricae
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a Rubricae model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

Enhancements.Name: The Stave Abominus
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons Infantry model only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS D3] and [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] abilities.

Rule.Title: WARPFIRE INFUSION
Rule.Text:
Each time a Thousand Sons Vehicle unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight, apply one of the following when resolving those attacks:

	▪ If that Vehicle unit is within 6" of one or more friendly Thousand Sons Psyker models, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll and one Damage roll.
	▪ Otherwise, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one Damage roll.

Each time a Thousand Sons Vehicle model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability is destroyed while it is within 6" of one or more friendly Thousand Sons Psyker models, that model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of 5+ instead of only a 6.

Stratagems.Name: Hex-Marked Armour
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons Vehicle unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

Stratagems.Name: Mutate Landscape
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons Psyker unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
Stratagems.Effect: That objective marker is mutated, and remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase. While an objective marker is mutated and under your control, each time an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move within range of that objective marker, roll one D6: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

Stratagems.Name: Cyberspirit Machinations
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after a Thousand Sons Vehicle unit from your army Falls Back.
Stratagems.Target: That Vehicle unit, and one friendly Thousand Sons Psyker unit within 6" of that Vehicle unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your Vehicle unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Malevolent Animus
Stratagems.When: Your Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons Vehicle unit from your army within 6" of one or more friendly Thousand Sons Psyker units.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the start of your next Command phase, your Vehicle unit is malevolent. While a unit is malevolent, it can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: the profile characteristics of its models; the Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill characteristics of weapons equipped by its models; any roll or test made for it (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

Stratagems.Name: Ensorcelled Infusion
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons Vehicle unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase, that is within 6" of one or more friendly Thousand Sons Psyker units.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by Vehicle models in your unit have the [PSYCHIC] ability and each time an attack is made with such a weapon, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Stratagems.Name: Warpflame Gargoyles
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons Vehicle unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Roll six D6: for each 5+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. That enemy unit must then take a Battle-shock test.

Enhancements.Name: Warp Syphon
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly Thousand Sons Vehicle units, each time the bearer Channels the Warp (pg 67), after you roll that additional D6 but before checking for doubles or triples, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, select one of those Vehicle units; that Vehicle unit suffers 1 mortal wound and you can re-roll that additional D6.

Enhancements.Name: The Perplexing Cloak
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons Infantry model only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly Thousand Sons Vehicle units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability.

Enhancements.Name: Biomechanical Mutation
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons model only. In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Thousand Sons Vehicle model within 6" of this model. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

Enhancements.Name: Warp-Cursed Runemaster
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons model only. While the bearer is within 6" of one or more friendly Thousand Sons Vehicle units, each time the bearer manifests a Ritual, while resolving that Ritual, add 6" to its range.

Rule.Title: FLOW OF MAGIC
Rule.Text:
Certain areas of the battlefield are within your army’s Flow of Magic, as follows:
	▪ Your deployment zone is always within your army’s Flow of Magic.
	▪ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within No Man’s Land, until the end of that phase, No Man’s Land is within your army’s Flow of Magic.
	▪ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the objective markers within your opponent’s deployment zone, until the end of that phase, your opponent’s deployment zone is within your army’s Flow of Magic.

Each time a Thousand Sons model from your army makes a Psychic Attack, re‑roll a Wound roll of 1. If such a model is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, each time it makes a Psychic Attack, add 1 to the Wound roll instead.

Stratagems.Name: Warding Hex
Stratagems.When: Command phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons Psyker unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control, if that objective marker is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic.
Stratagems.Effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

Stratagems.Name: Wrath of The Doomed
Stratagems.When: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if your unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

Stratagems.Name: Strands of Time
Stratagems.When: Your Movement phase, just after a Thousand Sons Psyker unit from your army Falls Back.
Stratagems.Target: That Thousand Sons Psyker unit.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot or declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic when it is targeted with this Stratagem, then until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

Stratagems.Name: Through The Veil
Stratagems.When: Start of the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Rubric Marines or Scarab Occult Terminators unit from your army that is in Strategic Reserves.
Stratagems.Effect: If it is a Rubric Marines unit, until the end of the phase, it has the Deep Strike ability. When your unit is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, if it is a Scarab Occult Terminator unit it can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.
Stratagems.Restrictions: If a Scarab Occult Terminators unit is targeted with this Stratagem, it is not eligible to declare a charge in the same turn.

Stratagems.Name: Scouring Warpflame
Stratagems.When: Your Shooting phase.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons Psyker unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase and is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability. After your unit has shot this phase, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, models in that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

Stratagems.Name: Kaleidoscopic Tempest
Stratagems.When: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
Stratagems.Target: One Thousand Sons Psyker unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
Stratagems.Effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability, and, if your unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, each time an attack targets your unit, it has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

Enhancements.Name: Arcane Might
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons model only. Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of Psychic weapons equipped by models in that unit instead.

Enhancements.Name: Empowered Manifestation
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons model only. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, you can add 6" to the range of Psychic abilities the bearer has that specify a range (including Rituals) and each time a model in the bearer’s unit takes a Hazardous test for a Psychic weapon, you can re‑roll the result.

Enhancements.Name: Empyric Onslaught
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons model only. While the bearer’s unit is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged Psychic weapons equipped by the bearer.

Enhancements.Name: Noctilith Mantle
Enhancements.Description: Thousand Sons model only. While the bearer’s unit is on the battlefield, it is wholly within your army’s Flow of Magic. Models in that unit cannot be selected to use any Rituals.

ArmyRules.Title: CABAL OF SORCERERS
ArmyRules.Text:
If your Army Faction is Thousand Sons, at the start of your Shooting phase, one or more models from your army with this ability can attempt Rituals from those listed on the right. To do so, select one model from your army with this ability that has not yet attempted a Ritual this turn and select one Ritual no model from your army has attempted to manifest this turn, then take a Psychic test for that model by following the sequence below:

PSYCHIC TEST SEQUENCE
	1. Roll 2D6
	2. Channel the Warp (Optional): Roll an additionnal D6 - If one or more doubles or triples were rolled during this test, that model’s unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.
	3. If that model is not destroyed, the combined total of all the dice rolled during this test is the Psychic test result. If this equals or exceeds the Warp Charge value of the Ritual being attempted, that model manifests that Ritual and you resolve its effects.

DESTINY’S RUIN (PSYCHIC) - 5 WARP CHARGE
Select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the manifesting model. Until the end of the phase, each time a Thousand Sons or Scintillating Legions model from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 10+, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

TEMPORAL SURGE (PSYCHIC) - 6 WARP CHARGE
Select one friendly Thousand Sons or Scintillating Legions unit that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and is within 24" of and visible to the manifesting model. That unit can make a Normal move of up to D6". If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 10+, that unit can make a Normal move of up to 6" instead. In either case, until the end of the turn, that unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

DOOMBOLT (PSYCHIC) - 7 WARP CHARGE
Select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the manifesting model (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability that are not part of an Attached unit and are not within 12" of the manifesting model); that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 11+, that unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds instead.

TWIST OF FATE (PSYCHIC) - 9 WARP CHARGE
Select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the manifesting model. Until the end of the phase, each time a Thousand Sons or Scintillating Legions model from your army makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. If the Psychic test result for this Ritual was 12+, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 2 instead.

ArmyRules.Title: PACT OF SORCERY
ArmyRules.Text: When mustering your army, unless specifically stated otherwise, you cannot select Scintillating Legions as your Army Faction.
